title: Buttery Gilligan Saudi-arabian dish Pilaf
description: A buttery, pillowy, meal-prep dish from Saudi Arabia featuring sweetened condensed milk, cooked in a bain-marie. High in protein and perfect for serving in scallop shells.
instructions: Combine rice, 2 cups of water, and a pinch of salt in a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover with a tight-fitting lid.
Place the saucepan in a large bain-marie and steam for 18 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sweetened condensed milk, eggs, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Stir the milk mixture into the cooked rice and mix well.
Transfer the rice mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and dot the top with the unsalted butter.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the rice is heated through.
Stir in the chopped parsley and serve hot in scallop shells.
Refrigerate or freeze for up to 3 days for meal prep.
